news.title: SpaceX targets fixed $135 IPO roadshow price at $1.75 trillion valuation, source says
news.summary: The valuation would make Elon Musk's company the seventh-biggest in the U.S. above Tesla, which has a market cap of about $1.6 trillion.

news.title: Sellers are pulling homes off the market at the fastest pace since 2020
news.summary: Frustrated sellers are pulling their homes off the market at an increasingly high pace. Demand weakens and bidding wars wane, making it harder to sell a home.

news.title: GOP Sen. Tillis slams Trump intelligence pick Pulte: 'Don't think he has a prayer'
news.summary: Pulte is widely viewed as a Trump loyalist. He has targeted the president's political foes during his tenure leading the housing regulatory agency.

news.title: A classic strategy that could yield big dividends
news.summary: Packaging Corp of America (PKG) is an old-school, brick-and-mortar industrial business. The company is based in New Jersey.

news.title: Bessent says he is performing IRS commissioner duties amid Trump tax settlement scrutiny
news.summary: Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin says other taxpayers affected by the leak of Trump's tax returns will get the same treatment. Democrats pressed the Treasury chief over whether other taxpayers would receive similar treatment.

news.title: Here’s advice on how to pick a doctor — from a doctor.
news.summary: A cardiologist outlines the best approach to finding a doctor. The questions to ask yourself when you do are: What is your medical history? What are your medical conditions?

news.title: AT&T’s stock is seeing its worst day in 8 months as the SpaceX threat comes into focus
news.summary: Investors aren't thinking enough about the risk posed by SpaceX’s satellite ambitions, an Oppenheimer analyst warned. SpaceX is a private company that aims to launch satellites into space.

news.title: Oil prices look to end at highest levels in over a week: ‘Oil tanks are getting emptier each week Hormuz stays closed’
news.summary: Oil futures were on track to settle Wednesday at their highest levels in more than a week. EIA reported a sixth straight weekly drop in U.S. commercial crude supplies.

news.title: Tom Steyer spent $216 million of his own money to run for governor of California — here’s where that ranks
news.summary: Tom Steyer, a Democratic candidate for California governor, looks on track to be eliminated from the race. Steyer is the latest big-spending and self-funding politician.

news.title: Marvell’s stock is on a run not seen in a quarter-century as the tech company grows in stature
news.summary: Marvell now ranks No. 22 in the Nasdaq-100 with a $269 billion market capitalization. That’s higher than those of PepsiCo and T-Mobile.
